Compare KYC, AML and identity providers.

Search by company, service area, jurisdiction, compliance workflow or capability. Each profile is structured for quick institutional shortlisting and AI-search clarity.

Showing 30 providers

A

01 / Identity Decisioning Platform

Alloy

Best forFintechs and token platforms needing automated KYC/AML decisioning workflows that combine multiple data sources into one pass/fail decision

Automates the entire identity decisioning process. If your tokenization platform needs to pull data from multiple identity sources, score the risk, and make an automated accept/reject/review decision without manual intervention, Alloy orchestrates that workflow.

Identity Decisioning190+ Data SourcesAutomated WorkflowsRisk Scoring
Provider intelligence

Alloy is not a single identity check. It is a decisioning platform that orchestrates multiple identity data sources (document verification, database checks, device signals, behavioral analytics) into a single automated workflow. You define your risk rules, Alloy runs the checks across providers, and returns a pass/fail/review decision. For tokenization platforms processing high volumes of investor onboarding, this automation eliminates manual review bottlenecks. Integrates with 190+ data sources.

HQ
USA
Founded
2015
Provider type
Identity Decisioning Platform
Service areas
Identity Verification, Fraud Detection, Decisioning
Jurisdictions
USA, Global
Visit alloy.com
A

02 / High-Accuracy Document Verification

AU10TIX

Best forPlatforms needing the highest accuracy identity verification (98.8%) with multi-layer deepfake detection and Travel Rule support

Provides 98.8% accuracy identity verification with multi-layer deepfake detection. If your tokenization platform faces sophisticated identity fraud (synthetic IDs, deepfake selfies, document forgery) and you need the highest-accuracy verification available, AU10TIX catches what other providers miss.

98.8% AccuracyDeepfake DetectionTravel RuleEnterprise
Provider intelligence

AU10TIX differentiates on accuracy. Their 98.8% verification rate is among the highest in the industry, achieved through multi-layer document analysis and deepfake detection that goes beyond basic liveness checks. They also support FATF Travel Rule compliance, making them useful for platforms that need both identity verification and Travel Rule data sharing. For tokenization platforms where a single fraudulent investor could create regulatory problems, AU10TIX's accuracy premium is justified.

HQ
Israel
Founded
2002
Provider type
High-Accuracy Document Verification
Service areas
Identity Verification, Deepfake Detection, Travel Rule
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit au10tix.com
B

03 / Reusable Web3 KYC

Blockpass

Best forWeb3 projects wanting KYC that users complete once and reuse across multiple platforms without re-verifying

Lets your users verify their identity once and reuse that verification across multiple Web3 platforms. If you want to reduce onboarding friction by accepting KYC that users have already completed elsewhere (rather than making them re-verify from scratch), Blockpass provides reusable identity with 1.1M+ verified users.

Reusable KYC1.1M+ VerifiedWeb3 NativePortable Identity
Provider intelligence

Blockpass solves the repeated KYC problem in Web3. Every time a user joins a new tokenized asset platform, they re-upload documents and re-verify. Blockpass lets users verify once and carry that verification to any platform that accepts Blockpass credentials. With 1.1M+ verified individuals, there is a meaningful user base that has already completed verification. For tokenization platforms, accepting Blockpass credentials means faster onboarding and higher conversion rates because users skip the verification step.

HQ
Hong Kong
Founded
2017
Provider type
Reusable Web3 KYC
Service areas
Identity Verification, Reusable KYC
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit blockpass.org
C

04 / Blockchain Analytics & Compliance Platform

Chainalysis

Best forExchanges, token issuers, and institutions needing comprehensive blockchain transaction monitoring, wallet screening, and regulatory reporting

The dominant blockchain analytics platform used by 70+ government agencies and most major exchanges. If your tokenization platform needs to screen wallet addresses, monitor transactions for suspicious activity, comply with sanctions requirements, or support regulatory investigations, Chainalysis is the industry standard.

Industry Standard70+ Gov AgenciesReal-Time MonitoringSanctions Screening
Provider intelligence

Chainalysis is not optional for regulated crypto businesses. Their platform provides real-time transaction monitoring (flag suspicious transfers as they happen), wallet screening (check if an address is associated with sanctioned entities, mixers, or illicit activity), investigation tools (trace the flow of funds across blockchains), and regulatory reporting. Used by 70+ government agencies including the FBI, IRS, and Europol. For tokenization platforms, Chainalysis ensures that every wallet interacting with your tokens is screened against sanctions lists and risk databases. The compliance baseline.

HQ
USA
Founded
2014
Provider type
Blockchain Analytics & Compliance Platform
Service areas
Blockchain Analytics, Transaction Monitoring, Wallet Screening, Investigations
Jurisdictions
Global - 70+ countries
Visit chainalysis.com
C

05 / On-Chain Identity Credentials

Civic

Best forWeb3 projects wanting to gate access using on-chain identity passes without storing personal data themselves

Issues on-chain identity credentials (Civic Pass) that verify a user has completed KYC without exposing their personal data on-chain. If your tokenized asset needs to restrict transfers to verified users but you do not want to store personal data, Civic's on-chain passes provide that compliance layer.

On-Chain CredentialsPrivacy-FirstCivic PassSmart Contract
Provider intelligence

Civic solves the privacy-compliance tension. Tokenized securities need to ensure only verified investors can hold tokens, but storing personal identity data creates privacy and security risks. Civic's approach: verify the user off-chain, issue an on-chain credential (Civic Pass) that proves they are verified, and let smart contracts check for the pass before allowing transfers. Your contracts enforce compliance, but you never store personal data. For tokenization platforms using ERC-3643, ERC-7518, or custom compliance standards, Civic passes integrate as the identity layer.

HQ
USA
Founded
2015
Provider type
On-Chain Identity Credentials
Service areas
On-Chain Identity, Credential Passes, Access Gating
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit civic.com
C

06 / AI-Powered Financial Crime Detection

ComplyAdvantage

Best forFinancial institutions and regulated platforms needing real-time AML screening with AI-driven risk scoring across traditional and crypto

Provides AI-driven financial crime detection with real-time AML screening. If your tokenization platform serves regulated financial institutions that require the same AML screening standards they use in traditional finance (not just crypto-native tools), ComplyAdvantage bridges both worlds.

AI Financial CrimeReal-TimeTraditional + CryptoInstitutional
Provider intelligence

ComplyAdvantage applies AI and machine learning to financial crime detection, screening against sanctions lists, PEP databases, and adverse media in real-time. Unlike crypto-native analytics tools (Chainalysis, Elliptic) that focus on on-chain activity, ComplyAdvantage covers both traditional AML screening and crypto-adjacent risk. For tokenization platforms that need to satisfy institutional compliance teams accustomed to traditional AML providers (not just blockchain analytics), ComplyAdvantage provides the familiar compliance standard with crypto awareness.

HQ
UK
Founded
2014
Provider type
AI-Powered Financial Crime Detection
Service areas
AML Screening, Sanctions, PEP Screening, Risk Scoring
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit complyadvantage.com
DI

07 / Verifiable Credentials Platform

Dock.io

Best forEnterprises building credential-based identity systems where verified attributes (accreditation, KYC status, qualifications) travel with the user

Provides verifiable credentials and decentralized identity infrastructure. If you are building a system where users carry verified attributes (accredited investor status, KYC completion, professional qualifications) as portable credentials that any platform can verify cryptographically, Dock provides the credential infrastructure.

Verifiable CredentialsPortable IdentityEnterpriseDecentralized
Provider intelligence

Dock.io focuses on verifiable credentials: digital attestations that prove something about a person (they passed KYC, they are an accredited investor, they hold a specific license) that can be independently verified by any relying party without contacting the issuer. For the tokenization ecosystem, this enables portable compliance: an investor verified by one platform carries that verification to others. Issuers can attach credentials to tokens. Compliance checks happen by verifying credentials rather than re-running identity checks.

HQ
USA
Founded
2017
Provider type
Verifiable Credentials Platform
Service areas
Verifiable Credentials, Decentralized Identity, Enterprise
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit dock.io
E

08 / Crypto Compliance Analytics

Elliptic

Best forCrypto businesses needing blockchain analytics focused specifically on compliance, risk scoring, and cross-chain transaction tracing

Provides blockchain analytics and compliance tools purpose-built for crypto businesses. If you need crypto-specific risk scoring, cross-chain transaction tracing, and compliance analytics (complementary to or alternative to Chainalysis), Elliptic offers deep coverage of DeFi protocols and cross-chain activity.

Crypto ComplianceDeFi AnalyticsCross-Chain TracingRisk Scoring
Provider intelligence

Elliptic competes with Chainalysis in the blockchain analytics space with particular strength in DeFi protocol coverage and cross-chain transaction tracing. Their platform monitors transactions across multiple blockchains, identifies risk patterns, and provides compliance reporting. For tokenization platforms where investors interact through DeFi protocols (liquidity pools, DEXs, lending platforms), Elliptic's DeFi-specific analytics provide visibility that traditional transaction monitoring misses.

09 / Enterprise AI Identity Verification

Incode

Best forLarge enterprises needing Gartner-recognized, AI-powered identity verification with the highest enterprise-grade accuracy

Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for identity verification with proprietary AI. If you are a large enterprise or financial institution that needs identity verification meeting the same standards your compliance team applies to traditional banking products, Incode delivers enterprise-grade accuracy with in-house AI.

Gartner LeaderEnterprise AIIn-House ModelsInstitutional
Provider intelligence

Incode is recognized by Gartner as a Magic Quadrant Leader, which matters for enterprises where vendor selection requires analyst validation. Their entirely in-house AI (not relying on third-party models) provides identity verification with accuracy rates that satisfy institutional compliance requirements. For large tokenization platforms or financial institutions launching tokenized products, Incode provides the enterprise credibility and accuracy that procurement and compliance teams expect.

10 / AI Biometric & Document Verification

Jumio

Best forCrypto exchanges and platforms needing fast, AI-powered document scanning and biometric liveness detection at scale

Provides AI-powered identity verification combining document scanning with biometric liveness detection. If your tokenization platform needs to verify thousands of investors quickly with automated document checks and liveness verification to prevent spoofing, Jumio handles that volume.

AI-PoweredBiometric + DocumentHigh VolumeExchange Trusted
Provider intelligence

Jumio combines document verification (ID scanning, data extraction, authenticity checks) with biometric liveness detection (confirming the person holding the ID is real and present, not a photo or deepfake). The AI-powered pipeline processes verifications quickly at scale. Widely adopted by major crypto exchanges, Jumio is a proven solution for high-volume investor onboarding. For tokenization platforms expecting thousands of investor verifications, Jumio's combination of speed, accuracy, and scale is the standard choice.

USA

Provider type

11 / Predictive Crypto Risk Intelligence

Merkle Science

Best forCompliance teams wanting predictive risk scoring that flags suspicious activity before it becomes a problem, not just after

Provides predictive crypto risk intelligence rather than purely historical analytics. If your compliance team wants to identify risky wallets and transactions before they interact with your platform (not just after), Merkle Science's predictive models flag emerging threats proactively.

Predictive RiskBehavioral AnalyticsAPAC StrongProactive
Provider intelligence

Merkle Science differentiates from Chainalysis and Elliptic by emphasizing predictive risk models. Rather than only analyzing historical transaction patterns, their platform uses behavioral analytics to predict which wallets and transaction patterns are likely to be associated with illicit activity. For tokenization platforms, this means flagging potentially risky investors or wallets before they complete transactions, not after regulatory damage is done. Particularly strong in Asia-Pacific markets.

N

12 / FATF Travel Rule Compliance

Notabene

Best forVASPs (exchanges, custodians, token platforms) needing FATF Travel Rule compliance for cross-VASP data sharing

The dedicated Travel Rule compliance platform. If your platform is a VASP (Virtual Asset Service Provider) and regulators require you to share originator and beneficiary data with counterparty VASPs for transfers above threshold amounts, Notabene handles that VASP-to-VASP data exchange.

Travel Rule SpecialistFATF ComplianceVASP NetworkAutomated
Provider intelligence

The FATF Travel Rule requires VASPs to share originator and beneficiary information for crypto transfers above certain thresholds (varies by jurisdiction). Notabene is the dedicated platform for this: it connects your platform with counterparty VASPs, facilitates the secure data exchange, handles the compliance logic (which jurisdictions require what data, at what thresholds), and maintains audit trails. For tokenization platforms where token transfers between wallets trigger Travel Rule obligations, Notabene automates what would otherwise be a manual, error-prone compliance process.

HQ
USA
Founded
2020
Provider type
FATF Travel Rule Compliance
Service areas
Travel Rule Compliance, VASP Data Sharing
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit notabene.id
O

13 / EU KYC/KYB Compliance Platform

Ondato

Best forEuropean regulated businesses needing KYC, KYB, and AML compliance specifically designed for EU regulatory requirements including MiCA

Provides KYC, KYB, and AML compliance specifically for EU-regulated businesses. If your tokenization platform operates under European regulation (MiCA, PSD2, AMLD) and needs compliance tools built for EU requirements rather than adapted from US-centric platforms, Ondato is purpose-built for European compliance.

EU-FocusedMiCA ReadyKYC + KYBGDPR Compliant
Provider intelligence

Ondato is built for the European regulatory landscape. Their platform covers KYC (individual verification), KYB (business verification for institutional investors), and AML screening with specific support for EU directives including MiCA, PSD2, and Anti-Money Laundering Directives. For tokenization platforms operating in the EU, Ondato understands the specific requirements: GDPR-compliant data handling, European document types, EU sanctions lists, and the evolving MiCA framework. European regulatory specificity rather than global generalization.

HQ
Lithuania
Founded
2018
Provider type

14 / Document & Biometric Verification

Onfido

Best forCrypto exchanges and token platforms needing proven, high-volume identity verification trusted by major exchanges worldwide

Provides document and biometric verification trusted by major crypto exchanges worldwide. If you need a proven identity verification provider that crypto exchanges already rely on and that handles high verification volumes reliably, Onfido is a safe, established choice.

Exchange TrustedDocument + BiometricProvenHigh Volume
Provider intelligence

Onfido is one of the most widely adopted identity verification providers in the crypto industry. Major exchanges rely on their document verification (scanning IDs, extracting data, checking authenticity) and biometric verification (facial matching, liveness detection). For tokenization platforms, choosing Onfido means choosing a provider with a proven track record at crypto-scale volumes and established integrations with the broader crypto ecosystem.

15 / Accredited Investor & KYC for Private Capital

Parallel Markets

Best forTokenized securities and private capital platforms needing combined accredited investor verification, KYC, and AML for Reg D offerings

Specializes in accredited investor verification alongside KYC and AML for private capital. If your tokenized security is offered under Reg D or similar exemptions that require investor accreditation verification, Parallel Markets handles the specific compliance requirements of private capital and tokenized securities.

Accredited VerificationPrivate CapitalReg D ComplianceSecurities
Provider intelligence

Parallel Markets fills a niche that general KYC providers do not cover: accredited investor verification for private capital offerings. When you issue a tokenized security under Reg D (506b or 506c), you need to verify that investors meet accreditation requirements (income thresholds, net worth, professional certifications). Parallel Markets handles this alongside standard KYC and AML, providing a single onboarding flow for private placement compliance. For tokenized securities specifically, this is more relevant than general-purpose KYC.

HQ
USA
Founded
2018
Provider type
Accredited Investor & KYC for Private Capital
Service areas
Accredited Investor Verification, KYC, AML
Jurisdictions
USA
Visit parallelmarkets.com
P

16 / Identity Infrastructure & Fraud Prevention

Persona

Best forPlatforms needing flexible, API-first identity infrastructure they can customize into complex verification workflows

Provides flexible identity infrastructure with APIs for building custom verification workflows. If your tokenization platform needs verification logic beyond standard KYC (multi-step flows, risk-based verification, custom rules engines), Persona gives you the building blocks to construct exactly the verification workflow you need.

Identity InfrastructureAPI-FirstCustom WorkflowsFlexible
Provider intelligence

Persona is identity infrastructure, not a rigid KYC product. Their APIs and workflow builder let you construct custom verification flows: start with document verification, add biometric if risk score is high, check sanctions lists, verify accreditation status, then route to manual review if flags are triggered. For tokenization platforms with complex compliance requirements (different verification levels for different investor types, jurisdictions, or investment amounts), Persona provides the flexibility to build exactly the workflow your compliance team designs.

HQ
USA
Founded
2018
Provider type
Identity Infrastructure & Fraud Prevention
Service areas
Identity Verification, Fraud Prevention, Workflow Builder
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit withpersona.com
PI

17 / ZK-Proof Self-Sovereign Identity

Polygon ID

Best forDevelopers building on Polygon who need privacy-preserving identity verification using zero-knowledge proofs

Self-sovereign identity using zero-knowledge proofs on Polygon. If your tokenization platform runs on Polygon and you want users to prove they are verified (over 18, accredited, KYC-passed) without revealing their personal data, Polygon ID lets them prove claims without exposing information.

Zero-KnowledgeSelf-SovereignPrivacy-PreservingPolygon Native
Provider intelligence

Polygon ID uses zero-knowledge proofs for identity: a user can prove they meet a requirement (age over 18, resident of a specific country, accredited investor) without revealing the underlying data. The verifier learns the claim is true but sees no personal information. For tokenized assets on Polygon that need compliance checks at the smart contract level, Polygon ID enables privacy-preserving compliance: your contract verifies the ZK proof, confirms eligibility, and allows the transfer without ever seeing a passport or address.

HQ
Global
Founded
2022
Provider type
ZK-Proof Self-Sovereign Identity
Service areas
Decentralized Identity, ZK Proofs, On-Chain Verification
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit polygonid.com
Q

18 / On-Chain Compliance Passport

Quadrata

Best forDeFi protocols and tokenized asset platforms needing on-chain identity attestations for compliance without storing personal data

Provides on-chain passport attestations that prove compliance status. If your DeFi protocol or tokenized asset needs to verify that a wallet belongs to a KYC-verified, non-sanctioned individual without handling personal data yourself, Quadrata's on-chain passports provide that compliance layer.

On-Chain PassportAttestationsSmart Contract ComplianceMulti-Chain
Provider intelligence

Quadrata issues on-chain passports: attestations stored on the blockchain that prove a wallet holder has been verified (KYC passed, not sanctioned, accredited investor, specific country of residence). Smart contracts can check these attestations before allowing interactions. For tokenized assets with transfer restrictions, Quadrata passports enable automated compliance at the smart contract level. The platform never stores personal data on-chain, only the attestation that verification occurred. Compatible with multiple chains and compliance frameworks.

HQ
USA
Founded
2021
Provider type
On-Chain Compliance Passport
Service areas
On-Chain Identity, Compliance Attestation, DeFi
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit quadrata.com
R

19 / Document Forensics & Biometric Verification

Regula

Best forPlatforms needing the deepest document forensic analysis to catch sophisticated forgeries that standard ID scanners miss

Provides forensic-level document verification and biometric analysis. If your platform deals with high-value transactions where sophisticated document forgery is a real risk (not just casual fraud), Regula's forensic document analysis catches manipulation that standard scanners miss.

Forensic-LevelDocument ExpertsBiometricHigh Security
Provider intelligence

Regula comes from a forensic document analysis background, not a startup KYC background. Their technology analyzes document security features at a forensic level: microprinting, UV features, hologram verification, paper texture analysis. This depth catches sophisticated forgeries that standard document scanners accept. For tokenization platforms handling high-value investments where the cost of a single fraudulent investor is significant, Regula's forensic depth provides an additional security layer beyond standard KYC providers.

HQ
USA
Founded
2006
Provider type
Document Forensics & Biometric Verification
Service areas
Document Verification, Biometric, Forensic Analysis
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit regulaforensics.com

20 / Crypto AML for Financial Institutions

Scorechain

Best forBanks and financial institutions needing blockchain AML analytics that integrate with their existing compliance infrastructure

Provides blockchain AML analytics specifically designed for financial institutions. If you are a bank or regulated financial institution adding crypto capabilities and need AML tools that speak the same compliance language as your existing infrastructure (not crypto-native tools your compliance team does not understand), Scorechain bridges that gap.

Bank-FocusedAML AnalyticsCompliance IntegrationLuxembourg
Provider intelligence

Scorechain is built for the compliance teams at traditional financial institutions entering crypto. Their blockchain AML analytics integrate with existing compliance workflows, produce reports in formats compliance officers recognize, and cover the regulatory requirements that banks face (not just crypto exchange requirements). For banks launching tokenized products or providing crypto custody, Scorechain provides AML analytics that fit into established compliance frameworks rather than requiring new processes.

21 / Digital Trust & Fraud Prevention

Sift

Best forCrypto platforms needing real-time fraud prevention covering payment fraud, account takeover, and bot attacks alongside identity verification

Provides digital trust and safety covering fraud prevention, account security, and content abuse. If your tokenization platform faces fraud beyond identity (payment fraud, account takeover, bot attacks, promotional abuse), Sift covers the broader trust and safety stack that pure KYC providers do not.

Trust & SafetyFraud PreventionAccount SecurityBot Detection
Provider intelligence

Sift goes beyond identity verification into the broader trust and safety domain. Their platform prevents payment fraud (fake deposits, chargeback abuse), account takeover (credential stuffing, session hijacking), and bot attacks (automated account creation, scraping). For tokenization platforms where fraud extends beyond fake identities into transaction manipulation, account compromise, and automated abuse, Sift provides the wider fraud prevention layer that complements your KYC provider.

USA
Founded
2011
Provider type
Digital Trust & Fraud Prevention
Service areas
Fraud Prevention, Account Security, Bot Detection

22 / AI Digital Identity Verification

Socure

Best forUS-focused platforms needing AI-powered identity verification with the lowest false positive rates for faster investor onboarding

Provides AI-powered digital identity verification with industry-leading accuracy and lowest false positive rates. If your US-focused tokenization platform loses potential investors to false rejections during KYC (legitimate users flagged as risky), Socure's AI reduces those false positives while maintaining security.

AI-PoweredLowest False PositivesUS-FocusedHigh Conversion
Provider intelligence

Socure's AI models achieve some of the lowest false positive rates in the industry, meaning fewer legitimate investors are wrongly rejected during onboarding. For tokenization platforms, every false positive is a lost investor. Socure's approach combines document verification, biometric analysis, email/phone/device intelligence, and behavioral signals into a single AI-driven risk score. Particularly strong in the US market where their data models have the deepest training. If you lose more investors to false KYC rejections than to actual fraud, Socure's accuracy directly improves your conversion.

USA
Founded
2012
Provider type
AI Digital Identity Verification
Service areas

23 / Crypto Market Surveillance

Solidus Labs

Best forToken issuers and exchanges needing market surveillance to detect wash trading, market manipulation, and insider trading in tokenized assets

Provides crypto-native market surveillance and risk monitoring. If you are issuing a tokenized security and regulators require you to monitor for market manipulation (wash trading, spoofing, insider trading), Solidus Labs provides the surveillance tools built specifically for crypto markets.

Market SurveillanceCrypto-NativeManipulation DetectionExchange Compliance
Provider intelligence

Solidus Labs fills a regulatory gap: market surveillance for crypto assets. When you issue a tokenized security, securities regulators expect market surveillance (the same kind traditional exchanges run). Solidus provides crypto-specific detection of wash trading, spoofing, layering, insider trading, and other manipulative behaviors. For tokenization platforms with ATS functionality or secondary market trading, market surveillance is not optional. Solidus is one of the few providers offering this specifically for crypto market structures.

24 / Open-Source Decentralized Identity

Spruce ID

Best forDevelopers wanting open-source, standards-based decentralized identity tools including Sign-In with Ethereum (SIWE)

Maintains the Sign-In with Ethereum (SIWE) standard and provides open-source decentralized identity tools. If you are building a Web3 application and want users to authenticate with their Ethereum wallet using an open standard (rather than proprietary identity), Spruce ID provides the tooling.

SIWE StandardOpen SourceDecentralizedDeveloper Tools
Provider intelligence

Spruce ID is the team behind Sign-In with Ethereum (SIWE), the standard that lets users authenticate to applications using their Ethereum wallet. Beyond SIWE, they build open-source tools for decentralized identity: verifiable credentials, decentralized identifiers (DIDs), and credential verification. For tokenization platforms wanting to integrate wallet-based authentication with verifiable identity credentials (prove KYC status through wallet interaction), Spruce provides the open-source standards and tooling.

USA
Founded
2020
Provider type

Service areas
Decentralized Identity, SIWE, Verifiable Credentials

Global

25 / Full-Cycle KYC/KYB/AML Platform

Sumsub

Best forCrypto and fintech platforms needing a single provider for KYC, KYB, AML screening, and ongoing monitoring across 220+ countries

The most comprehensive single-platform solution covering KYC, KYB (business verification), and AML across 220+ countries. If you want one provider handling individual verification, business verification, sanctions screening, and ongoing monitoring without stitching together multiple vendors, Sumsub covers the full compliance cycle.

220+ CountriesFull-CycleKYC + KYB + AMLOne Platform
Provider intelligence

Sumsub's value is completeness. Rather than using one provider for document verification, another for AML screening, and another for KYB, Sumsub covers the full cycle in one platform: individual KYC (document + biometric verification in 220+ countries), KYB (business verification for institutional investors), AML screening (sanctions, PEP, adverse media), and ongoing monitoring (continuous checks after onboarding). For tokenization platforms serving both retail and institutional investors across multiple jurisdictions, Sumsub's breadth eliminates the complexity of managing multiple identity vendors.

Founded

26 / Web3-Native On-Chain KYC

Synaps

Best forWeb3 projects wanting KYC results linked directly to wallet addresses with on-chain verification capability

Provides Web3-native identity verification with on-chain KYC linked to wallet addresses. If your tokenized asset platform wants KYC verification tied directly to blockchain wallets (not just email addresses) with the ability to check verification status on-chain, Synaps bridges traditional KYC with Web3 wallets.

Web3 NativeWallet-LinkedOn-Chain VerificationSmart Contract
Provider intelligence

Synaps connects traditional KYC verification directly to blockchain wallets. When a user completes verification through Synaps, the result is associated with their wallet address, and verification status can be checked on-chain. For tokenized assets where smart contracts need to verify that a wallet holder has completed KYC before allowing token transfers, Synaps provides the direct wallet-to-identity bridge. This is particularly useful for ERC-3643 and ERC-7518 compliant tokens that enforce transfer restrictions at the smart contract level.

France

Blockchain IntelligenceFraud DetectionReal-TimeFinancial Crime
Provider intelligence

TRM Labs focuses on blockchain intelligence and financial crime detection with particular strength in real-time threat assessment. Their platform identifies fraud patterns, traces illicit fund flows, and provides actionable intelligence for compliance teams. 28 / Global Identity Verification Network

Trulioo

Best forPlatforms needing to verify individuals and businesses across the broadest global coverage (5B+ people, 330M+ businesses)

Operates the broadest global identity verification network covering 5B+ people and 330M+ businesses. If your tokenization platform serves investors globally and you need a single provider that can verify identities in markets where other providers have gaps (emerging markets, less-common document types), Trulioo has the widest reach.

5B+ People330M+ BusinessesBroadest CoverageKYB
Provider intelligence

Trulioo's differentiator is global reach. Their network can verify 5B+ individuals and 330M+ businesses across virtually every country. For tokenization platforms with global investor bases, this matters when you encounter investors from countries where your primary KYC provider has limited coverage. Trulioo can verify identities in markets that most other providers cannot cover. They also handle KYB (business verification), which is essential when institutional investors onboard to your tokenization platform.

HQ
Canada
Founded
2011
Provider type
Global Identity Verification Network
Service areas
Identity Verification, KYB, Global Coverage
Jurisdictions
Global - Broadest Coverage
Visit trulioo.com
V

29 / AI Video Identity Verification

Veriff

Best forEuropean and global platforms needing AI-powered video verification with strong GDPR compliance and multi-language support

Provides AI-powered identity verification with video verification capability. If your platform serves European users and needs GDPR-compliant verification with video-based identity checks and multi-language support, Veriff is the European-strong provider with global reach.

AI VideoGDPR CompliantEuropean DNAMulti-Language
Provider intelligence

Veriff, based in Estonia, brings European regulatory DNA to identity verification. Their AI-powered platform includes video verification (a live video session where the user shows their document and face), which provides higher assurance than static photo-based verification. Strong GDPR compliance, multi-language support, and European document expertise make Veriff particularly suitable for tokenization platforms operating under EU regulation. Their video verification option is useful for high-value transactions where additional identity assurance is warranted.

HQ
Estonia
Founded
2015
Provider type
AI Video Identity Verification
Service areas
Identity Verification, Video Verification, Biometric
Jurisdictions
EU, Global
Visit veriff.com
WW

30 / Biometric Proof of Personhood

Worldcoin / World ID

Best forProjects needing cryptographic proof that each user is a unique human being, preventing sybil attacks and duplicate accounts

Provides biometric proof of personhood using iris scanning. If your tokenized asset platform needs to guarantee that each user is a unique human being (not a bot, not a duplicate account, not a synthetic identity), World ID uses biometric verification to provide that cryptographic proof of uniqueness.

Iris BiometricProof of PersonhoodSybil PreventionCryptographic
Provider intelligence

Worldcoin / World ID tackles the most fundamental identity question: is this user a unique human being? Using iris scanning (via their Orb device), World ID creates a cryptographic proof that a person is real, unique, and has not already registered. This proof can be verified on-chain without revealing who the person is. For tokenized asset platforms, this prevents sybil attacks (one person creating multiple accounts to game airdrops, governance, or allocation limits). The trade-off is the iris scanning requirement, which raises privacy concerns for some users, but the proof of uniqueness guarantee is unmatched.

HQ
USA
Founded
2019
Provider type
Biometric Proof of Personhood
Service areas
Biometric Verification, Proof of Personhood, Sybil Prevention
Jurisdictions
Global
Visit worldcoin.org

Selection framework

How to evaluate a KYC AML provider.

01

Separate identity from monitoring

Document verification, biometric liveness, KYB, sanctions screening, blockchain analytics and Travel Rule workflows are related, but often require different provider strengths.

02

Map jurisdiction and user type

Retail investor onboarding, institutional KYB, accredited investor verification, EU compliance and global coverage each point to different vendor profiles.

03

Review crypto-native controls

Wallet screening, transaction monitoring, source-of-funds checks, market surveillance and on-chain credentials matter when tokenized assets move through Web3 rails.

04

Check privacy and integration model

Decide whether you need a full-cycle platform, modular APIs, reusable credentials, smart contract gating or zero-knowledge identity proofs.

FAQ

KYC AML provider questions.

What does a KYC AML provider do?

A KYC AML provider helps verify users and businesses, screen against sanctions and PEP lists, monitor activity, reduce fraud, support reporting and manage compliance workflows for regulated financial and digital asset products.

Do tokenization platforms need both KYC and blockchain analytics?

Many tokenization platforms need both. KYC verifies the person or entity, while blockchain analytics screens wallet addresses, transaction history and source-of-funds risk.

Can FluidRWA help shortlist KYC AML providers?

Yes. Submit your requirements and FluidRWA can help turn the broad compliance vendor landscape into a focused provider path for your project.
